name: TOP_ORIGIN_BY_YOY_2024
description: Top origin by yoy in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year IN [$year - 1, $year]
RETURN y.year AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY year ASC

examples: What is the year-over-year growth rate in 2024 for the China origin group?
What is the year-over-year growth rate in 2024 for the US origin group?
What is the year-over-year growth rate in 2024 for the Personal origin group?
